mapper.select: SELECT qi.*, wo.product_name AS work_order_product_name FROM quality_inspection qi LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON qi.work_order_id = wo.id WHERE qi.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quality_inspection (work_order_id, inspection_date, inspector, inspection_quantity, qualified_quantity, unqualified_quantity, unqualified_reason, pass_rate) VALUES (#{workOrderId}, #{inspectionDate}, #{inspector}, #{inspectionQuantity}, #{qualifiedQuantity}, #{unqualifiedQuantity}, #{unqualifiedReason}, #{passRate})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(inspection_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, ROUND(AVG(pass_rate), 2) AS avgPassRate FROM quality_inspection GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(inspection_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT unqualified_reason AS reason, COUNT(*) AS count FROM quality_inspection WHERE unqualified_reason IS NOT NULL AND unqualified_reason != '' GROUP BY unqualified_reason ORDER BY count DESC
